SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JEFF MORGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PHIL SODERQUIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT SERVICED PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT IN THE HALL OF D501. PLAINTIFF WAVIES UNTIMELY SERVICE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, JEFF IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SODERQUIST, PHIL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-12-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 AS PREVIOUSLY FILED POSTPONEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-01-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SODERQUIST, PHIL RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MORGAN, JEFF $1,694.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,769.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
